== Notes for [[Item:Q87224|Q87224]] ==

Cnaeus Cornelius Publius Lentulus Marcellinus
* MyHeritage Family Trees
* Larousse-Bonvillian in Larousse Web Site, managed by Jody M. Larousse (Contact)
* Birth: abt 105 BC
* Death: abt 56 BC
* Parents: Publius Cornelius Lentulus Marcellinus, Cornelia Scipia
* Sister: Caecilia Felix (born Metella)
* Wife: Fabia Marcellinus (born Di Roma)
* Children: Lucius Cornelius Lentulus, Cnaeus Cornelius Lentulus

Gnaeus Cornelius Publius Lentulus Marcellinus
* MyHeritage Family Trees
* Bahuth,Smith,Livezey Family Tree 8-1-82 in Smith, Bahuth \ Web Site, managed by Elaine Smith (Contact)
* Birth: 105 BC
* Death: 56 BC
* Parents: Publius Cornelius Lentulus Marcellinus, Cornelia Marcellinus (born Scipia)
* Sister: Caecilia Metella Felix (born Dalmaticus)
* Wife: Fabia Marcellinus (born Roma, Di)
* Children: Lucius Cornelius Lentulus, Gnaeus Cornelius Lentulus

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
